cards.name: Original Ape
cards.effectText: No effect.

cards.name: Blue Face Original
cards.effectText: If played in the Art lane, gain +1 Power.

cards.name: Gold X Original
cards.effectText: If this card has a Trait, gain +2 Power.

cards.name: Dreaded Original
cards.effectText: If you are winning this lane, gain +2 Power.

cards.name: Gallery Original
cards.effectText: Gains +2 Power in the Art lane.

cards.name: Chain Original
cards.effectText: Gains +2 Power in the Blockchain lane.

cards.name: Community Original
cards.effectText: Give another friendly card in this lane +1 Power.

cards.name: Rare Original
cards.effectText: Gains +1 Power for each Trait in this lane.

cards.name: Genesis Original
cards.effectText: No effect.

cards.name: Rally Original
cards.effectText: If played in Community, draw 1 card.

cards.name: On-Chain Original
cards.effectText: Reduce the cost of your next Trait by 1.

cards.name: Be Original
cards.effectText: If this is your only card in this lane, gain +3 Power.

cards.name: Kaizo
cards.effectText: Give a friendly ORIGINAL in this lane +2 Power.

cards.name: Spike
cards.effectText: If you are losing this lane, Spike gains +2 Power.

cards.name: Community Pup
cards.effectText: Give another friendly card here +1 Power.

cards.name: Chain Guardian
cards.effectText: Gains +1 Power in Blockchain.

cards.name: Gallery Scout
cards.effectText: Gains +2 Power in Art.

cards.name: Rally Beast
cards.effectText: Friendly COMPANIONS in this lane gain +1 Power.

cards.name: Gold X Emblem
cards.effectText: Give a friendly ORIGINAL +2 Power.

cards.name: Astronaut Helmet
cards.effectText: Give a friendly card +1 Power and protect it from the next negative effect.

cards.name: Dread Trait
cards.effectText: Give a card +1 Power. If played in Community, give +2 instead.

cards.name: Rare Eyes
cards.effectText: Give a card +3 Power.

cards.name: Chain Badge
cards.effectText: If played in Blockchain, give a card +3 Power. Otherwise give +1.

cards.name: Original Fit
cards.effectText: Give a friendly ORIGINAL +4 Power.

cards.name: Art Gallery
cards.effectText: ORIGINALS in the Art lane gain +1 Power.

cards.name: Community Rally
cards.effectText: COMPANIONS in the Community lane gain +1 Power.

cards.name: Blockchain Portal
cards.effectText: Your first TRAIT each turn costs 1 less.

cards.name: Mint Day
cards.effectText: Cards in Blockchain gain +1 Power.

cards.name: Creator Studio
cards.effectText: Cards with Traits in Art gain +2 Power.

cards.name: Community Space
cards.effectText: At end of match, gain +1 Power here for each friendly card in this lane.
